title: Night
description: 🌙Night SMP PvP Pack is a PvP-focused resource pack made for clarity and performance, perfect for SMP and competitive combat. It features smooth textures and visual tweaks to reduce distractions and improve visibility during fights.
body:
Features:

Smooth item textures for clean gameplay
Dark-themed swords and tools (night style)
Reworked armor textures
Clean crystal and combat visuals
Smaller shield for less screen clutter
Low fire texture
Reduced particles for better visibility
Simplified GUI elements
Lightweight pack for improved FPS
